frontier.hypothesis: No further avenue is derivable in this residual's search space via ANY method tried across 8 sessions (hand-derivation s2-s3, permuter s4-s5, RTL/source forensics s6-s7, rederivation s8).
frontier.mechanism: The residual is a single front-end tree-fold decision (convert_for_assignment's decl_constant_value/TREE_READONLY gate, c-typeck.c:3987/985) that is generic C semantics for ANY negative-literal-to-unsigned-lvalue assignment, confirmed at the source-line level (s7) and independently corroborated by an unbiased fresh m2c decompile (s8) that reproduces the identical clean-floor shape with no alternative chassis.
frontier.next_probe: None with expected yield remains in pure-C source-structure space. This is now a pure POLICY question (already surfaced by s6/s7): is the Judge's ruling against the typed-holder-variable family final and permanent for this residual, in which case the function should be treated as policy-blocked (floor=1 accepted or escalated for a ruling), rather than continuing to re-run search methods that four consecutive modalities (structural, permuter, forensics, rederive) have now each independently exhausted.

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Two codegen-control constructs fail the human-programmer test (test #2) and the semantic-purpose test (test #1): (1) a typed s16 intermediate used to clamp a u16 global — `{ s16 tmp = -0x1C00; g_file_vram_timer = tmp; }` — has no semantic difference from `g_file_vram_timer = -0x1C00;` and the SOTN named-intermediate sanction does not cover typed-literal coercion; (2) an explicit `(s32)` cast on a 32-bit AND mask — `& (s32)0xFFFEFFFE` — changes the RTL type of the expression (SI vs USI) without changing the MIPS `and` instruction or the runtime result, and a human programmer would write `& ~0x10001` or the unsigned literal without a signed cast. Both constructs change how GCC 2.7.2 sees the type of a computation in order to influence scheduling or RTL analysis, with no observable semantic effect. Next action: a worker must produce a clean pure-C form — replace `{ s16 tmp = -0x1C00; g_file_vram_timer = tmp; }` with `g_file_vram_timer = -0x1C00;` (or the natural u16 equivalent) and `& (s32)0xFFFEFFFE` with `& ~0x10001` (or `& 0xFFFEFFFE` without cast), then verify sandbox distance is 0 and SHA1 == oracle before re-submitting.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)

Match must land with a plain assignment to `g_file_vram_timer` (u16) — no `{ s16 tmp = …; }` local, no `*(s16 *)&…` pointer-cast pun, no other typed-lvalue coercion whose sole function is to change the HImode-vs-SImode store encoding. The `& ~0x10001;` mask form is accepted.

Do NOT commit or record func_8001B138 as complete at floor=1. The current candidate.c stays as the working clean-C form (byte-correct construct remains on main per the regression diagnosis's own transition rule: 'The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands'). Next grind action is escalation to the owner in docs/grind/decisions.md with the four-modality exhaustion record and the c-typeck.c:3987 pinpoint, requesting an explicit owner policy call: either (a) an owner-signed narrow SOTN-list amendment naming a specific construct exception for the u16-lvalue negative-literal-store residual, or (b) an owner-signed park decision for this function specifically. The grinder must not self-authorize either. Modality changes (not target changes) are still available if any remain untried — but the ledger evidences that source-structure space is genuinely exhausted, so the honest next step is escalation, not another rerun of the same four modalities.

Grinder must NOT self-authorize park, NOT commit/record complete at floor=1, and NOT apply named-local-fake-exception or any other SOTN-carve-out spelling to this residual without an owner-signed amendment. The single next allowed action for this function is escalation to docs/grind/decisions.md per prior judge_constraints[2], carrying the c-typeck.c:3987 mechanism pinpoint and the five-modality exhaustion record; treat any further modality re-run of the already-exhausted ladder as invalid work and discard/respawn it.
